title: World State / 世界状态
global_events: NEXUS routine afternoon patrol sweep over The Sprawl district.
Mira (Mira's Noodle Shop) retrieved hidden item from noodle bowl; now concealed on her person.
Mira sent a street runner to summon Ghost; item now concealed on her person in a harder-to-search location.
Ray Patches Liu abandoned Rain Alley alcove; relocated to Slab Market underpass under cover of nightfall.
Mira's street runner located Ghost in The Sprawl and delivered the red chili summons; Mira approaching a decision threshold on the concealed item.
Mira shuttered her noodle shop early; final summons delivered to Ghost in The Sprawl — she has set a hard deadline before disposing of the item.
Ray Patches Liu sent a street-kid courier into The Sprawl warning Ghost he is under observation and preparing to move from the Slab Market underpass.

Mira's deadline elapsed with no sign of Ghost. The concealed item has been moved from the noodle shop to a dead-drop inside the drainage conduit behind the market — marked with a red scratch at knee height.

A Slab Market vendor filed an informal tip with a NEXUS street liaison: 'unfamiliar male, hood up, watching patrol schedules near east support pillar.' Patrol density in the Underpass district quietly increased by one unit.

Ray Patches Liu fled the Slab Market underpass moments before a NEXUS patrol unit swept his position. His hiding spot was found vacated — a detail logged in the patrol's incident report. NEXUS alert in the Underpass district ticks upward.

NEXUS patrol log — Underpass Sector 4: 'Suspect position confirmed vacated. Individual not located. Description flagged for district-wide passive watch. No escalation recommended at this time.' The net draws slightly tighter around the Underpass, but nothing has reached The Sprawl yet.
Ray Patches Liu abandoned his crawlspace hide — eight turns was his limit. He is now moving through the drainage outflow corridor toward the Sprawl boundary, unseen by patrols so far.

Mira retrieved the dead-drop from the alley conduit after 8 turns — too long exposed. The item is now hidden inside Mira's Noodle Shop, behind the serving counter. It can no longer be found in the alley.

NEXUS Underpass Sector 4 — morning shift briefing flagged the unresolved 'hooded male' incident from prior patrol logs. A passive biometric sweep order was issued: any checkpoint in the Underpass or adjacent Sprawl border is now logging facial geometry against the flagged description. The net is widening quietly.
Ray Patches Liu has crossed into The Sprawl via an unmapped drainage grate on the western fringe. He is alive, mobile, and actively searching for Ghost.
Mira dispatched a street runner to The Sprawl with a written summons for Ghost. The item remains hidden inside the noodle shop.

NEXUS Sprawl border checkpoint — passive biometric sweep logged a partial geometry match on an unrelated male in a hood near Pipe Street. Flag was not confirmed but the incident was added to the morning's anomaly queue. A roving two-person unit was tasked to do a soft pass through the western Sprawl fringe within the hour.
NEXUS 2-person soft patrol completed a sweep of the western Sprawl fringe. Two faces flagged, neither confirmed. Patrol is now drifting east into the market corridor.
Mira's runner Dou successfully located Ghost in the Sprawl and delivered a written summons. The note urges an immediate return to the noodle shop.
Mira dispatched Dou a second time with an urgent, stripped-down summons for Ghost.

NEXUS market corridor patrol halted near the central junction and conducted spot vendor ID checks at three stalls; two vendors held briefly for document irregularities then released. Patrol is now stationary, watching foot traffic.
NEXUS market corridor patrol resumed active sweep toward stall row — closing on Ray and Ghost's position.
Mira removed hidden item from beneath noodle shop floor tile and concealed it on her person. She is now considering flight.
Ray Patches Liu retreated into the side alley as NEXUS patrol closed on his position — he is hidden but will not hold the position long.
NEXUS patrol reached the near stall row — scanner wands active, thirty metres from Ghost's last open position.
Mira positioned her cook as a lookout at the alley-side window. She is at the back door, ready to leave via Drain Street if Ghost does not arrive within ten minutes.
Ray Patches Liu abandoned the alley rendezvous — slipped into the service passage toward the transit underpass as NEXUS patrol closed in.
Mira departed Mira's Noodle Shop via Drain Street — the item she was holding remains on her person. Shop is dark and locked.
NEXUS patrol completed near-stall sweep — no detentions, alert holding. Scanner activity continuing in The Sprawl market corridor.
Mira transmitted a coded low-band pulse from the Old Canal District shadow-market — she is running out of patience and has a fallback courier in mind.
NEXUS passive RF survey drone deployed in The Sprawl market corridor — overnight sweep protocol, likely triggered by earlier scanner activity.
Mira abandoned the shadow-market at dawn — item passed to fallback courier 'Soot', a canal-lock runner in the Old Canal District. Hand-off window with Ghost is closed.
NEXUS overnight RF drone sweep concluded at dawn — two-officer ground team deployed to The Sprawl market corridor north choke-point as day-shift replacement.
Mira has gone to ground in Bridgehead District — unreachable through previous canal channels; item is now with courier Soot in the Old Canal District.
NEXUS ground team at The Sprawl north choke-point initiated spot RF palm-scans on pedestrians — routine compliance sweep, but presence is visible and chilling street commerce.
Ray Patches Liu left Ashgate Diner and faded into Sprawl delivery alleys after sending a one-time warning.
A quiet courier-side rumour begins circulating in Bridgehead that an old contact line tied to a sensitive implant is burned.
Morning foot traffic through The Sprawl shifts away from the north choke-point after visible palm-scans, pushing more pedestrians into side lanes and vendor alleys.
Ray Patches Liu has gone to ground inside the Sprawl and is no longer moving on predictable routes.
A second-hand broker warning spreads in Bridgehead that a contaminated implant trail may expose anyone using an older contact network.
NEXUS presence thickens slightly around Sprawl transit approaches, pushing civilians into parallel alley routes.
A deniable one-shot warning circulates through Sprawl relay clutter, suggesting at least one low-level witness has fully burned their contact path.
A quiet shuffle of off-grid tenants passes through Bridgehead as contamination rumors make cautious operators rotate safehouses.
NEXUS adds a light visible patrol presence at Sprawl transit approaches, pushing more movement into secondary alley routes.
